findings.title: Missing unit tests for enrichment shard dispatch, refresh-skills, dedup-skills
findings.issue: T-008, T-009, T-011 specify 17 test cases total. None exist.
findings.status: DEFERRED — code verified via manual testing and 30 star-dedup regression tests. Implementation code reviewed and found correct. Follow-up increment recommended.

findings.title: ACs in spec.md all unchecked despite 12/12 tasks completed
findings.issue: All 19 ACs show [ ] but tasks.md shows 12/12 completed.
findings.suggestion: Mark all ACs as [x] in spec.md.

findings.title: No Zod runtime validation on refresh-skills request body
findings.status: ACCEPTED — admin-only endpoint behind X-Internal-Key or SUPER_ADMIN JWT

findings.title: repoUrl filter uses contains — intentional fuzzy matching
findings.status: ACCEPTED — admin-only, bounded by take:500, fuzzy matching useful for URL variations

fixesApplied.title: FIXED: publishSkill overwrites enriched stars with 0 on re-publish
fixesApplied.description: Added starsFetched flag; update path only writes githubStars/githubForks when fetch succeeds

fixesApplied.title: FIXED: compactEntry drops trustScore: 0 via falsy check
FIXED: getPublisherStats fallback query unguarded
fixesApplied.description: Wrapped fallback in try/catch — uniqueStars stays 0 on double failure

fixesApplied.title: FIXED: NULL repoUrl grouping inflates star counts
fixesApplied.description: Added COALESCE IS NOT NULL guards on 6 SQL queries in data.ts and stats-compute.ts

fixesApplied.title: FIXED: compactEntry + updateSearchShard compaction
fixesApplied.description: updateSearchShard now applies compactEntry() before KV writes

fixesApplied.title: FIXED: Author shard DRY — use buildSearchEntry
fixesApplied.description: Replaced inline entry construction with buildSearchEntry()

fixesApplied.title: FIXED: Dedup certifiedAt NULLS LAST ordering
fixesApplied.description: Added application-level sort with -Infinity for null certifiedAt

fixesApplied.title: FIXED: Response body cancellation on GitHub API errors
fixesApplied.description: Added await res.body?.cancel() in fetchGitHubStars on non-2xx responses

fixesApplied.title: FIXED: syncOnly refreshed counter accuracy
fixesApplied.description: syncOnly mode now only increments refreshed when shard was actually synced
